name: MCP gateway
responsibility: Aggregates policy-scoped MCP profiles; terminates OAuth; evaluates policy; records audit; issues short-lived internal identity; proxies hosted-server administration and governed artifact downloads.
canonical_interfaces: HTTPS; MCP Streamable HTTP; OAuth/OIDC; internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: SurrealDB control revisions and security records

name: Console BFF
responsibility: Owns the browser security boundary, PKCE login, encrypted HttpOnly sessions, CSRF enforcement, installation projections, and explicit administrative workflows.
canonical_interfaces: HTTPS; same-origin JSON; OAuth; gateway admin and artifact routes

name: Operations console web application
deployment: static assets served by Console BFF
responsibility: Presents health, tasks, artifacts, agents, recordings, MCP topology, policy, audit, and installation state without receiving gateway bearer tokens.
canonical_interfaces: HTTPS; same-origin Console BFF API

name: Artifact service
responsibility: Enforces tenant, label, grant, release, retention, share-link, and write-capability policy for governed artifact occurrences and bytes.
canonical_interfaces: Internal HTTP; public share redemption; S3-compatible API; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: SurrealDB artifact identity and authorization records; object store bytes

name: Recording Hub
deployment: single private spooler per recording volume
responsibility: Accepts gateway-authorized recording batches, journals small durable RRD parts, and publishes keyframe-aligned immutable archive shards through one footer-writing object-store compaction pass.
canonical_interfaces: Private authenticated HTTP; versioned protobuf; filesystem RRD parts and archive shards; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: Internal durable parts; immutable RRD archive shards; SurrealDB recording catalog

name: Agent kernel
responsibility: Runs bounded autonomous episodes with MCP tools, elicitation, memory, replay, budgets, recording, and detach/resume behavior.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; agent runtime API; DuckDB; Rerun
authoritative_state: SurrealDB-backed runtime descriptors; RRD episode evidence

name: Agent runtime
responsibility: Persists agents, wakes, episodes, watcher leases, retry schedules, task descriptors, results, and retention pins across process restart.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; SurrealDB WebSocket; durable outbox

name: Platform store
responsibility: Owns persistence record types, ordered migrations, stable identities, transactional outbox, changefeed replay, and platform-store access.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; SurrealDB WebSocket

name: Durable task runtime
responsibility: Owns UUIDv7 task creation, idempotency, leases, claims, progress, elicited input, cancellation, terminal results, retention, recovery, and outbox transitions.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; platform store; outbox

name: DuckDB runtime
responsibility: Provides owner-scoped DuckDB workspace construction and locked analytical execution primitives.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; DuckDB C API and files

name: Shared MCP contract
deployment: linked into gateway clients and servers
responsibility: Defines cross-service Rust models and domain identifiers for gateway configuration, policy vocabulary, artifacts, coordinates, storage, tasks, subscriptions, usage, and URI conventions.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API

name: Final MCP task extension
deployment: linked into gateway clients and durable servers
responsibility: Implements discovery, task-required invocation, get, update, cancel, list, notifications, and SSE subscription projection over the shared runtime.
canonical_interfaces: MCP JSON-RPC extension; SSE task subscription

name: MCP stdio bridge
deployment: one bridge process for the Rerun viewer server
responsibility: Projects a child stdio MCP server onto bounded Streamable HTTP while preserving the registered gateway identity.
canonical_interfaces: MCP stdio; MCP Streamable HTTP

name: Artifact client
responsibility: Provides the native Rust client for artifact metadata, capabilities, upload, download, grants, release, and sharing operations.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; artifact-service internal HTTP

name: RRD library
deployment: linked into recording query and agent components
responsibility: Provides Rerun/RRD read, merge, query, and recording utility behavior shared by the platform.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; RRD files

name: Artifact MCP server
responsibility: Exposes governed artifact discovery, metadata, grants, release states, share links, subscriptions, prompts, and completions through canonical artifact URIs.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket

name: Frames MCP server
responsibility: Converts WGS84, ECEF, ENU, and NED frames; derives local frames; persists coordinate operations; and executes durable batches.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket

name: DuckDB MCP server
responsibility: Executes arbitrary query, execute, ingest, and export SQL inside bounded owner-scoped workspaces with governed inputs and outputs.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; artifact-service internal HTTP; DuckDB files
authoritative_state: Owner-scoped DuckDB files; SurrealDB task metadata

name: Media MCP server
responsibility: Provides provider-neutral media model discovery, schemas, generation tasks, webhook-only provider completion, usage reconciliation, and governed output artifacts.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; provider HTTPS API; signed webhook HTTPS; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: SurrealDB provider jobs events usage and tasks; artifact plane outputs

name: Map MCP server
responsibility: Governs map sources and releases; performs geodesy, CRS transformation, location inspection, restrictions, reachable areas, routing, and logistics matrices.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; administrative HTTP; artifact-service internal HTTP; local subprocess protocols
authoritative_state: SurrealDB map governance records; DuckDB catalog; map release files

name: Optimization MCP server
responsibility: Builds deterministic planning options, records durable task state, and publishes plan artifacts.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: SurrealDB task metadata; artifact plane plan outputs

name: Perception MCP server
responsibility: Authorizes recorded sensor data, extracts bounded clips, runs local detection and tracking, and publishes detection and tracking results plus derived RRD annotations.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; recording catalog and RRD reads; runner subprocess; artifact-service internal HTTP
authoritative_state: SurrealDB analyses and tasks; artifact plane outputs

name: Recording MCP server
deployment: replicated read projection with shared recording volume
responsibility: Applies tenant and label authorization to recording discovery, query, sealing, subscriptions, artifact publication, range-capable archive windows, and bounded-history live following.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; authorized HTTP RRD byte streams; RRD read-only volume; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: Recording Hub archive shards and SurrealDB catalog

name: Timeseries MCP server
responsibility: Runs forecasting as durable work and publishes forecast artifacts and RRD output.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: SurrealDB task metadata; artifact and RRD outputs

name: Datasheet MCP server
deployment: replicated hosted service and canonical Python template
responsibility: Demonstrates the Python platform contract through dataset preview, column statistics, task-based profiling, prompts, completions, resources, and notifications.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: SurrealDB task metadata; artifact plane reports

name: Chart MCP packaged service
responsibility: Packages the pinned chart MCP implementation and exposes chart compilation, validation, rendering, view creation, resources, and prompts through the gateway.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP

name: Rerun viewer MCP child
deployment: child process behind the stdio bridge
responsibility: Provides the Rerun viewer's MCP tool surface under the registered rerun server identity.
canonical_interfaces: MCP stdio

name: SUMO MCP server
responsibility: Owns serialized TraCI access, exposes traffic reads and actuation, runs durable generation and optimization tasks, and pushes world state to a pod-local Recording forwarder.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; TraCI; loopback Rerun gRPC; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: SUMO live state; SurrealDB tasks; RRD recordings

name: SUMO simulator and LuST world
responsibility: Runs the pinned LuST traffic scenario and exposes private TraCI control to the SUMO MCP owner.
canonical_interfaces: TraCI TCP

name: Python hosted-server SDK
responsibility: Provides Python models and helpers for identity, pagination, internal authentication, telemetry, artifacts, deployment, task runtime, and the final task extension.
canonical_interfaces: Python API; MCP; HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket

name: Map data acquisition helper
deployment: subprocess in the Map MCP container
responsibility: Normalizes authoritative OSM, GTFS, maritime, aviation, and authority datasets into bounded acquisition products.
canonical_interfaces: JSON subprocess contract; filesystem exchange
authoritative_state: Map acquisition scratch and release files

name: Perception DeepStream runner
responsibility: Executes the bounded GStreamer and DeepStream pipeline and returns detections and tracks that match the owning server's contract.
canonical_interfaces: JSON process contract; GStreamer; NVIDIA metadata

name: MCP conformance client
responsibility: Exercises external MCP surfaces and configuration against real or fake services.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; HTTP

name: Rust smoke harness
responsibility: Owns multi-process and container lifecycle, readiness, timeouts, cleanup, MCP and HTTP calls, assertions, and deployment contract verification.
canonical_interfaces: Process control; Docker; k3d; Kubernetes and Helm APIs; HTTP; MCP; filesystem evidence

name: k3d local development environment
responsibility: Creates a current K3s cluster with mandatory NVIDIA GPU access, imports local images, and applies profile-owned Helm values without selecting a simulator in generic configuration.
canonical_interfaces: k3d; Kubernetes API; containerd; NVIDIA device plugin

name: Helm deployment chart
responsibility: Instantiates the service graph with existing secrets, network policy, persistent storage, optional service-mesh mTLS, and ingress controls.
canonical_interfaces: Kubernetes API; Helm values and schema

name: Offline bundle builder and loader
deployment: connected build host and isolated target host
responsibility: Builds and verifies digest-pinned images, configuration schemas, checksums, SPDX SBOMs, and Helm material without requiring target-network access.
canonical_interfaces: OCI image archives; tar; SHA-256; SPDX; filesystem
authoritative_state: Bundle manifest and retained verification evidence

name: SurrealDB platform database
responsibility: Provides the sole durable coordination store for identity, control, policy, tasks, artifacts, recordings, agents, audit, and outbox state.
canonical_interfaces: SurrealDB WebSocket and HTTP

name: S3-compatible object store
responsibility: Stores governed artifact bytes while the Artifact service owns identity and authorization.
canonical_interfaces: S3-compatible HTTPS or private HTTP

name: Installation edge and ingress
responsibility: Terminates installation ingress and exposes only console, gateway, public share redemption, and required provider plumbing routes.
canonical_interfaces: HTTPS

name: Enterprise identity provider
responsibility: Authenticates users and clients and supplies issuer, JWKS, claims, authorization, and token endpoints to the gateway trust configuration.
canonical_interfaces: OIDC discovery; OAuth 2.0; JWKS HTTPS

name: OpenTelemetry collector and SIEM export
responsibility: Receives logs, traces, metrics, and audit-compatible telemetry and forwards installation-approved signals.
canonical_interfaces: OTLP gRPC and HTTP; SIEM exporter

name: Media generation provider
responsibility: Accepts media jobs, delivers signed terminal webhooks, and provides output bytes only to the bounded server-side completion path.
canonical_interfaces: Provider HTTPS API; signed webhook HTTPS

name: NVIDIA DeepStream and TensorRT runtime
responsibility: Decodes H.264, executes site-approved TensorRT engines, and emits native detection and tracking metadata without starting a Triton service.
canonical_interfaces: GStreamer plugins; CUDA and NVIDIA driver APIs
authoritative_state: Mounted model engines and transient GPU state

name: DuckDB and Spatial runtime
responsibility: Provides arbitrary analytical SQL, spatial functions, bounded owner workspaces, spill, ingest, and export execution.
canonical_interfaces: Embedded DuckDB API; SQL; local files

name: Map processing and routing toolchain
responsibility: Builds and serves routing tiles, transforms geospatial data, and validates transit datasets under the Map MCP owner.
canonical_interfaces: Local HTTP and process APIs; files
authoritative_state: Map release and routing tile files

name: Rerun data model and transport
responsibility: Carries world logs into producer-local forwarders, encodes footer-indexed RRD shards, supports range-oriented reads and live following, and renders recording evidence.
canonical_interfaces: Loopback Rerun gRPC; RRD files; Rust SDK

name: Container execution environment
implementation: Kubernetes with an OCI container runtime
responsibility: Runs isolated service images, networks, volumes, secrets, resource limits, GPUs, and deployment health controls.
canonical_interfaces: Kubernetes API; OCI runtime; container network and storage APIs

name: Time MCP server
responsibility: Resolves civil, military, GNSS, and mission time against versioned authority releases; evaluates calendars and windows; observes clock quality; publishes temporal events; and runs durable timeline work.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; administrative HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket; HTTPS authority acquisition; filesystem releases
authoritative_state: SurrealDB temporal catalog and tasks; authority release files

name: View MCP server
responsibility: Maintains owner-scoped camera views over configured 3D Tiles, bounds network and CPU/GPU residency, renders offscreen with NVIDIA Vulkan, and returns frames with attribution and capture metadata.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; HTTPS and mounted 3D Tiles; Vulkan; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: Process-local views and caches; SurrealDB task metadata

name: Recording forwarder
deployment: producer host process or Kubernetes native sidecar
responsibility: Receives native Rerun traffic on producer loopback, persists a bounded queue, authenticates with OAuth private_key_jwt, resumes from durable checkpoints, and uploads versioned batches through the gateway.
canonical_interfaces: Loopback Rerun gRPC; OAuth discovery and client credentials; authenticated HTTPS protobuf
authoritative_state: Producer-local queue files until Hub acknowledgement

name: MCP Apps extension
deployment: linked into MCP App servers and hosts
responsibility: Owns the pinned MCP Apps extension constants, typed UI metadata, application resources, capability declarations, tool links, and sandbox-host message helpers.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; MCP resources and tool metadata; sandboxed postMessage bridge

name: Recording ingest protocol
deployment: linked into gateway Hub forwarder and tests
responsibility: Owns the canonical versioned protobuf schema, media type, routes, limits, digest validation, stream checkpoints, discovery records, and typed recording ingest errors.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; Protocol Buffers; HTTP media type

name: UAV Simulation MCP server
deployment: pod-local hosted service beside the UAV simulator
responsibility: Governs simulation sessions, missions, vehicles, tiles, recording references, durable tasks, resources, subscriptions, prompts, and typed adapter commands without exposing simulator-native control ports.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; private adapter HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket; artifact-service internal HTTP
authoritative_state: SurrealDB task and mission metadata; simulator-owned live state

name: UAV simulation runtime and adapter
deployment: GPU-backed interactive pod or bounded batch Job
responsibility: Owns the typed pod-private simulator adapter, Isaac stage mutation, camera and telemetry capture, MAVLink lifecycle, frame conversion, and Rerun publication.
canonical_interfaces: Private HTTP; Python APIs; loopback Rerun gRPC; MAVLink 2; ROS 2
authoritative_state: Live simulator state and ephemeral runtime data

name: UAV simulation execution stack
implementation: Isaac Sim 6.0.1, Cesium for Omniverse 0.29.0, Pegasus 5.1.0, PX4 1.17.0
responsibility: Renders Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles, supplies multirotor physics and PX4 integration, and executes the simulator-native callbacks governed by the UAV adapter.
canonical_interfaces: Isaac and Omniverse extension APIs; USD; CUDA and Vulkan; MAVLink 2; Cesium ion HTTPS
authoritative_state: Streamed tiles GPU state vehicle dynamics and PX4 process state

name: Reason MCP server
responsibility: Authorizes recorded video, runs bounded local world-model inference, grounds semantic events in recording time, and publishes governed annotations and reports.
canonical_interfaces: MCP Streamable HTTP; recording read API; bounded runner process; artifact-service internal HTTP; SurrealDB WebSocket
authoritative_state: SurrealDB analyses and tasks; artifact plane annotations and reports

name: Recorded video materialization
responsibility: Applies recording authority, resolves frozen or sealed RRD segments, extracts decoder-reentrant keyframe ranges, and remuxes bounded H.264 selections without re-encoding.
canonical_interfaces: Rust API; Recording Hub read plans; RRD video indexes; MP4 bytes
authoritative_state: No independent authority; authorized recording segments only

name: MCP schema macro
responsibility: Publishes each typed tool parameter through the canonical client-facing JSON Schema generator while preserving the ordinary rmcp handler contract.
canonical_interfaces: Rust procedural macro; shared MCP contract schema API
